data.content: Implementation complete at commit 212b589e on origin/codex/34d0-update-doctor. Update now prints installed/latest/resulting versions; installer command-list noise is removed; doctor probes configured, IPv4/IPv6 loopback, and assigned interface URLs with complete attempted-endpoint errors. Gates passed: lint, typecheck, 1967 unit tests, 554 manual tests, production build, generated launcher bash syntax, and diff checks.
